```erlang
-module(solve).
-export([solve/3]).

solve(N, Edges, K) ->
    EdgesSorted = lists:sort(fun(A, B) -> A rem 1000000 < B rem 1000000 end, Edges),
    MaxEdge = lists:max([E rem 1000000 || E <- Edges]),
    BinarySearch(N, EdgesSorted, K, 0, MaxEdge).

BinarySearch(N, Edges, K, Low, High) ->
    case Low > High of
        true -> 0;
        false ->
            Mid = (Low + High) div 2,
            Count = count_components(N, Edges, Mid),
            if Count =< K ->
                BinarySearch(N, Edges, K, Low, Mid - 1);
               true ->
                BinarySearch(N, Edges, K, Mid + 1, High)
            end
    end.

count_components(N, Edges, Mid) ->
    Parent = lists:seq(0, N-1),
    Rank = lists:seq(1, N),
    {Parent, Rank} = process_edges(Edges, Mid, Parent, Rank),
    Roots = get_roots(Parent),
    length(Roots).

process_edges(Edges, Mid, Parent, Rank) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun(E, {P, R}) ->
            U = element(1, E),
            V = element(2, E),
            W = element(3, E),
            if W =< Mid ->
                {NewP, NewR} = union(U, V, P, R),
                {NewP, NewR};
               true ->
                {P, R}
            end
        end,
        {Parent, Rank},
        Edges
    ).

get_roots(Parent) ->
    Roots = lists:foldl(
        fun(X, Acc) ->
            Root = find(Parent, X),
            lists:append(Acc, [Root])
        end,
        [],
        lists:seq(0, length(Parent) - 1)
    ),
    lists:usort(Roots).

find(Parent, X) ->
    case X of
        X when X >= length(Parent) -> error;
        X ->
            ParentX = lists:nth(X+1, Parent),
            if ParentX == X -> X;
               true -> find(Parent, ParentX)
            end
    end.

union(U, V, Parent, Rank) ->
    X_root = find(Parent, U),
    Y_root = find(Parent, V),
    if X_root == Y_root ->
        {Parent, Rank};
       true ->
        X_rank = lists:nth(X_root+1, Rank),
        Y_rank = lists:nth(Y_root+1, Rank),
        if X_rank < Y_rank ->
            NewParent = lists:sublist(Parent, 0, X_root) ++ [Y_root] ++ lists:sublist(Parent, X_root+1, length(Parent) - X_root - 1),
            NewRank = lists:sublist(Rank, 0, Y_root) ++ [Y_rank + 1] ++ lists:sublist(Rank, Y_root+1, length(Rank) - Y_root - 1),
            {NewParent, NewRank};
           true ->
            NewParent = lists:sublist(Parent, 0, Y_root) ++ [X_root] ++ lists:sublist(Parent, Y_root+1, length(Parent) - Y_root - 1),
            NewRank = lists:sublist(Rank, 0, X_root) ++ [X_rank + 1] ++ lists:sublist(Rank, X_root+1, length(Rank) - X_root - 1),
            {NewParent, NewRank}
        end
    end.
